title: Tea of Discourtesy
description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Activates at the start of each combat for a limited duration. After one use, the relic becomes disabled.
